overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action-adventure game showing a warrior character traversing a rocky coastal cliffside environment. The character follows a companion through grassy paths, descends steep cliffs, climbs wooden ladders, and navigates narrow rocky corridors under an overcast sky.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a grassy cliff path following a companion

notable_agents.action: companion walking ahead on the path

calm sea visible in the distance beyond the cliff edge
jagged rocks and small islands in the water
green grass covering the cliff top path

segments.scene_description: Walking along a grassy cliff top path with the ocean visible to the left, following a companion through an overcast landscape with rocky outcrops on the right.

agents.ego_description: climbing up the wooden ladder attached to the cliff wall

notable_agents.action: companion waiting at the top of the ladder

segments.scene_description: Climbing up a rough wooden ladder attached to the rock face, with the companion waiting at the top, transitioning from the lower cliff area to the upper path.

segments.scene_description: Navigating through narrow rocky corridors and crevices with patches of snow on the rocks, following the companion through the enclosed terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy valley with distant standing stones

distant stone structures become visible on the horizon

agents.ego_description: running down slopes and across the open valley toward distant landmarks

notable_agents.action: companion running ahead toward the valley exit

entered.detail: ancient standing stones or ruins visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Emerging into an open grassy valley and running down the slopes toward distant stone structures visible on the horizon, transitioning from enclosed rocks to open landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an exposed coastal cliffside through restrictive rocky crevices and into a wide, open valley. It begins by following a companion along a grassy cliff top path with the ocean visible to the left and rocky outcrops to the right under an overcast sky. As the path ends, the camera descends the rocky cliff face via wooden ladder structures, transitioning from the heights back up through a rough wooden climb to reach a higher ledge. The scene then shifts into narrow rocky corridors and crevices marked by patches of snow, creating a sense of enclosure as the camera navigates the tight terrain. Finally, the view expands as the camera emerges from the rocks into an open grassy valley, running down the slopes toward distant stone structures on the horizon.
